sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame
lines_before = before.ascii.split('\n')
lines_after = after.ascii.split('\n')

# Find all differences
diffs = []
for r in range(64):
    for c in range(64):
        if r < len(lines_before) and c < len(lines_before[r]) and r < len(lines_after) and c < len(lines_after[r]):
            if lines_before[r][c] != lines_after[r][c]:
                diffs.append((r, c, lines_before[r][c], lines_after[r][c]))

print(f"Differences: {len(diffs)}")
for d in diffs:
    print(f"  ({d[0]}, {d[1]}): '{d[2]}' -> '{d[3]}'")

# Focus on the token area
print("\nToken area BEFORE:")
for r in range(41, 47):
    print(f"  {r}: '{lines_before[r][24:44]}'")

print("\nToken area AFTER:")
for r in range(41, 47):
    print(f"  {r}: '{lines_after[r][24:44]}'")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
